metadata.data_quality: partial — wave-level munitions counts incomplete for most waves; timing approximate; cross-referenced against Wikipedia 'List of attacks during the Twelve-Day War'

aggregate_stats.trigger_event: Israeli preemptive Operation Rising Lion strikes on Iranian nuclear facilities

countries_with_casualties.PS: 5 civilians injured (Houthi missile at Sair, West Bank)
countries_with_casualties.IQ: US consulate Erbil targeted (2 drones intercepted)

us_targets_hit: US Embassy Branch Office Tel Aviv (shockwave damage)
US Consulate General Erbil, Iraq (2 drones intercepted)
key_israeli_impacts: Bat Yam residential building: 9 killed, 200+ injured, 61 buildings damaged
Tamra residential building: 4 Arab Israelis killed
Petah Tikva 20-story building: 4 killed (incl. Holocaust survivor)
Ramat Gan residential: 1 killed, 9 buildings destroyed
Bazan Oil Refinery Haifa: 3 killed, refinery shut down
Haifa Power Plant: 2 missiles, damage and fire
Soroka Medical Center Beersheba: struck, 80 injured
Weizmann Institute Rehovot: 2 missiles, 45 labs damaged ($500M-$1B damage)
Glilot intelligence base: missile hit confirmed by satellite
Tel Nof airbase: missile hit confirmed by satellite
Kirya IDF HQ Tel Aviv: ballistic missile damage
Eshkol Power Station Ashdod: struck, power outages

targets.targets: Military centers, air bases

impact.damage: Serious damage to sensitive military centers in Tel Aviv area

targets.targets: Haifa, Galilee

impact.damage: State of emergency declared across Israel

targets.targets: Occupied territories — penetrated multiple defense layers
Tel Aviv, Haifa, other cities

impact.damage: Continued escalation — strikes on urban areas

targets.targets: Haifa oil refinery, military targets

impact.damage: Haifa oil refinery directly hit and shut down

proxy.description: Houthis joined from Yemen with coordinated launches

targets.targets: Israeli C2 centers, Haifa, Tel Aviv; Bat Yam struck

impact.damage: Bat Yam residential building struck — 9 killed (incl. 5 Ukrainian nationals), 200+ injured, 61 buildings damaged. Worst single incident of the war.

targets.targets: Strategic/sensitive targets in Tel Aviv, Haifa — C2 systems targeted
Tel Aviv, Haifa — enhanced intelligence-guided targeting
Haifa, Tel Aviv — continued bombardment
Israeli airbases from which jets attacked Iran

impact.damage: Nevatim Airbase absorbed ~32 MRBMs; direct hit on hardened F-35I shelter (IDF claimed no aircraft damaged). Glilot intel base hit. Tel Nof base hit. Kirya HQ damaged.

weapons.payload: Fattah-1 (first combat use in TP3), Emad, Ghadr, others

targets.targets: Air defense radars, military targets — Fattah used to destroy radar systems, clearing path for follow-on missiles

impact.damage: Fattah-1 used to destroy air defense radar systems

weapons.payload: Sejjil (~8 missiles, first combat deployment), other MRBMs

targets.targets: Tel Aviv — ultra-heavy, long-range, two-stage Sejjil missiles
Military sites, military industry in Haifa/Tel Aviv
Military/industrial facilities
Military targets — new phase of campaign
Military targets
Military/strategic targets

weapons.payload: Shahed-136 drones and precision missiles — new innovations in missile selection, target choice, and guidance paths

targets.targets: 14 strategic military sites: Hadera power plant, Haifa oil refinery, Ovda airbase (cyber command), Kiryat Gat semiconductor zone, Rafael center Haifa

impact.damage: 14 strategic military sites targeted including Hadera power plant, Haifa oil refinery, Ovda airbase (cyber command), Kiryat Gat semiconductor zone, Rafael center Haifa. Bazan Oil Refinery struck (3 killed, refinery shut down). Haifa Power Plant struck (fire).

weapons.payload: Combined missiles and drones — large combined operation

targets.targets: Strategic targets — large combined operation

weapons.payload: 40 missiles (solid + liquid fuel), Kheibar Shekan multi-warhead variant (first use)

targets.targets: Ben Gurion Airport, biological research centers, C2 facilities

interception.interception_report: 10 of 27 ballistic missiles hit Israel — highest single-wave penetration rate (~37%)

impact.damage: Ben Gurion Airport temporarily shut down; flight diversions for 36 hours

targets.targets: Military/strategic targets — new tactics for precision and destructiveness
Military and logistical centers — final wave minutes before US-brokered ceasefire

impact.damage: Beersheba residential building struck at 5:40am IST. 4 killed, 20 injured. Final missiles until 7:10am. IRGC called it a 'historic lesson'.
